sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99295" key="sunanaxala/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνανα-χᾰλάω</orth>, <sense id="n99295.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">relax at the same time</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
